creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 169341
Patch to fix build of multimedia/transcode using ffmpeg 3.0.x

multimedia/transcode: Fix build with ffmpeg 3.0.x

Add patch to allow transcode to build successfully once multimedia/ffmpeg is updated to 3.0.x. Note that multimedia/ffmpeg is currently still on the 2.8.x branch, however this patch is backwards compatible with ffmpeg 2.8.x.

Also fix MASTER_SITES while we are here, as distfile downloads were falling back to the freebsd local servers.
